summary: Excellent soundboard capture of a flawless acoustic set featuring standout renditions of Jack‑a‑Roe, China Doll, Dark Hollow and Ripple.
review: The recording presents a beautifully clear acoustic Dead performance lasting just under an hour, with every instrument sitting nicely in the mix. Reviewers rave about the superb versions of Jack‑a‑Roe, China Doll, Dark Hollow, Ripple and the whimsical “Heaven Help the Fool”, noting that the set is consistently excellent despite its similarity to other Warfield acoustic shows.

ai_rating.rationale: All four reviews are strongly positive, averaging 4.75 stars; both the musical performance and the soundboard recording are described as excellent.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers describe the audio as beautifully recorded with crystal‑clear acoustic detail and no noted flaws.

show_quality.setlist_flow: A tight, 47‑minute acoustic set that flows smoothly; reviewers note the consistency across Warfield acoustic shows but still find this performance exceptional.
